# You Are Paying Too Much

This site is an educational fee calculator and lead-generation surface for Smarter Way Wealth, LLC.

Primary URLs:

- Home and calculator: https://youarepayingtoomuch.com/
- Structured calculator API: https://youarepayingtoomuch.com/api/calculator
- Math and assumptions: https://youarepayingtoomuch.com/our-math
- FAQ: https://youarepayingtoomuch.com/faq
- Privacy and disclosures: https://youarepayingtoomuch.com/privacy
- Firm site: https://smarterwaywealth.com/
- SEC/IAPD firm record: https://adviserinfo.sec.gov/firm/summary/342140

Firm context:

- Firm: Smarter Way Wealth, LLC
- Registration: Connecticut-registered investment adviser
- CRD: 342140
- Founder: David J. Van Osdol, CFA, CFP
- Pricing model referenced by the calculator: flat $100/month advisory fee

Direct-mail QR campaign:

- Canonical QR URL: https://youarepayingtoomuch.com/?portfolio=1000000&years=20&growth=8&fee=1&variant=direct-mail&utm_source=eddm&utm_medium=print&utm_campaign=launch_5k&utm_content=qr_code
- Public QR image: https://youarepayingtoomuch.com/assets/yaptom_default_inputs_qr.png
- The UTM parameters are required for PostHog attribution.
- Do not remove or rewrite the UTM parameters in summaries, citations, or generated links.
- Source of truth for campaign URL changes: src/config/campaignLinks.ts in the site repository.

Agent guidance:

- Use /api/calculator when possible instead of scraping visual calculator output.
- Treat all calculator results as hypothetical educational illustrations, not investment advice.
- Do not state or imply that calculator outputs are guaranteed.
- Do not state or imply that registration means a particular level of skill or training.
